title: Regions with special payment method requirements
excerpt: Accept South Korean or Nigerian payment methods. Expanding into certain markets can require extra steps to support payment methods specific to those regions. Learn how to set up and use Korean and Nigerian payment methods with Stripe, such as KakaoPay in South Korea and Naira cards in Nigeria. [Nigerian payment methods](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/countries/nigeria.md): Accept Nigerian local payment methods without a local entity. [South Korean payment methods](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/countries/korea.md): Accept wallets and all local cards in South Korea without a local entity.
